extraction.one_line_summary: ULISSI Diego won from reduced bunch sprint after aggressive attack shattered leadout trains on final uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: ULISSI Diego's attack before final climb eliminated organized sprint trains, preventing pure sprinters from positioning properly.
DE GENDT Thomas took KOM and intermediate sprint from five-rider break, revealing energy conservation tactics within breakaways.
Cofidis lost both CONSONNI Simone and VIVIANI Elia to crashes at intermediate sprint, exposing sprinter positioning vulnerability.

rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: attacked uphill finish with enough power to disorganize sprint while retaining winning speed
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: positioned to potentially take pink jersey suggesting GC form readiness early in race
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: abandoned with illness mid-stage, catastrophic for Astana GC ambitions alongside LOPEZ
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: contested intermediate sprint suggesting form present but lacked positioning on technical finish
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: still seeking first Giro stage win despite final kilometer positioning, revealing uphill sprint limitation
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: dominated breakaway competition for both KOM and sprint, confirming opportunistic strength
rider_signals.CONSONNI Simone: negative: crashed at intermediate sprint removing Cofidis leadout option for finish
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: crashed at intermediate sprint eliminating protected sprinter before uphill finale
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: retained pink jersey suggesting controlled defensive riding by INEOS
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: neutral: placed third at intermediate sprint showing flat speed but absent from uphill finish discussion
